question: Where is the woman relative to the horse? Select from the following options: (A) She is beside the horse.. (B) She is standing behind the horse.. (C) She is sitting on top of the horse.. (D) She is standing in front of the horse..
answer_choices: She is standing behind the horse
She is sitting on top of the horse
She is standing in front of the horse

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: A woman standing directly behind the horse, partially obscured by its body.
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: A woman standing beside the horse, visible next to its side.

inpaint_prompt_used: A woman standing directly behind the horse, partially obscured by its body.
negative_prompt_used: A woman standing beside the horse, visible next to its side.
